title: Simple Ships
description: Adds working and fast ships for multiple passengers!
body:
# Simple Ships

**Simple Ships** adds wooden ships - drive at high speed alone or with friends behind you!

Perfect for exploring the sea or having races with not just boring boats.

---

## ❓ FAQ

### How fast are the ships?
In comparison to Vanilla boats - very fast! Just try it out and be amazed.

### Does it work with other mods?
Yes. Simple Ships adds its very own entities so nothing else is affected.

### Is this mod server- or client-side?
You need it on both server and client for the logic and the textures, though in Singleplayer everything works fine!

---

## 📌 Compatibility
- Minecraft **1.21.8**
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
- Compatible with mods and resource packs
